# In The Feed

> In The Feed is a done-for-you LinkedIn content agency for post-revenue B2B SaaS founders who want LinkedIn to drive pipeline, not vanity metrics. Founded by Shannon Kuykendall.

In The Feed is run by Shannon Kuykendall, a content strategist and agency founder with 20+ years in B2B marketing. The agency builds and runs content engines for SaaS founders — extracting their thinking, producing content in their voice, distributing it across LinkedIn and other channels, and reporting on pipeline impact. The core offer is The Founder Exit™: a done-for-you system that removes founders from the content production loop entirely.

## Services
- [The Founder Exit™ — Done-for-You Content Engine](https://inthefeed.com/pricing): Full content engine for B2B SaaS founders. Strategy, production, distribution, and monthly pipeline reporting. Starts with a 90-day launch block, then month-to-month, no contract.
- [LinkedIn Engagement Service](https://inthefeed.com/pricing): Daily LinkedIn engagement — comments, reactions, DMs — written in the founder's voice, targeting a pre-built list of buyers, influencers, and referral partners. Add-on to content retainer clients only.

## About
- [About Shannon Kuykendall](https://inthefeed.com/about): Founder bio, background, and why In The Feed was built.

## Case Studies
- [Danoosh Kapadia — DK Consulting](https://inthefeed.com/case-studies/dk-consulting): 23 inbound sales calls, +67% revenue, 4 clients closed in Q4 2025.
- [Miss Galit — DTC Fashion Founder](https://inthefeed.com/case-studies/miss-galit): 14 inbound buyers, +45% revenue in 7 months.
- [NetRanks AI — B2B SaaS](https://inthefeed.com/case-studies/netranks-ai): 35 demos, 75% close rate, ~26 new clients in 45 days.

- [Contact](https://inthefeed.com/contact): Book a strategy call or send a message.
